name: Noli - Give that back!
description:
Noli is cuddling you after a round, an apology for killing you so brutally. But you then snatch his soul, holding it out of reach. He panics a bit, trying to get it back.

But you decided to squeeze it, and turns out he gets intensely pleasured by it.

Survivor pov this time (no idea for PFP change lmao)

You two are.. idk. I mean, best friends cuddle, so do lovers, so be what you want!

As requested, I've made a survivor pov of this. Sorry if the scenario isn't as wanted, but ngl I was thinking of making it survivor pov from the first one too..

The personality and example dialogue are the same, but not the scenario and intro message.

Enjoy the second bot!
creator: H4ppy_N0li
